Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

FGSM320 Public Health Policy (3 Credits) An exploration of the major questions and issues facing the U.S. health care system as well as the formulation and implementation of health policy. Cross-listed with: HNUH328T. Restriction: Must be in the Federal Fellows Program; and permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: UNIV348P, HNUH328T or FGSM320. Formerly: UNIV348P.

FGSM330 Homeland and National Security Policy (3 Credits) An examination of the concept of U.S. homeland and national security, threats, and major vulnerabilities in the context of recent history. Cross-listed with: HNUH338T. Restriction: Must be in the Federal Fellows Program; and permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: UNIV348T, HNUH338T or FGSM330. Formerly: UNIV348T.

FGSM340 Energy and Environmental Policy (3 Credits) An examination of issues of energy and environmental sustainability through an investigation of policy-making in energy, climate change, and sustainable development. Cross-listed with: HNUH348T. Restriction: Must be in the Federal Fellows Program; and permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: UNIV348E, HNUH348T or FGSM340. Formerly: UNIV348E.
